0.text: Bilateral pleural effusions measuring up to 18 mm on the right and 25 mm on the left at their deepest points

1.text: Wider band atelectatic changes in the basal segments of both lower lobes

2.text: Wider band atelectatic changes in areas adjacent to the effusion on the left

3.text: Focal consolidation previously seen in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe has markedly reduced
